## Description
A clear description of what you want to add or change.

## Use Case
Who benefits and why?

## Affected Sections
- [ ] Dashboard
- [ ] Tasks
- [ ] Deliverables
- [ ] Billing
- [ ] Meetings
- [ ] Updates
- [ ] Documents
- [ ] Request Form
- [ ] Admin Panel
- [ ] Authentication

## Notion Changes Required
Does this need new Notion database properties or databases?

## Additional Context
Screenshots, mockups, or references.
